name: Claude
summary: Route Claude, Claude Code, Anthropic API, and Anthropic Console traffic through DAM.

commands.label: Run Claude Code through explicit-proxy fallback

notes: Claude Code keeps its normal Anthropic API endpoint; Claude web, Anthropic Console, and Claude platform pages use their normal HTTPS endpoints. Network Extension capture is primary and explicit proxy remains a fallback for source builds and unsupported environments.
`dam integrations apply claude` ensures a DAM-owned JSON profile file under the integration profile directory; it does not mutate Claude settings.
Use the listed explicit-proxy fallback command only for source builds and unsupported environments.
Claude and Anthropic clients keep provider authentication; DAM only receives and forwards the request headers.
